message:
feat(parser): add ES2020 rest element validation and expand parser test coverage

Production code:
- Add early error check for object destructuring patterns: reject
  patterns with more than one rest element, as per ES2020 spec
  (rest element must be the last property in an object pattern)

Test enrichment (+370 lines):
- Add comprehensive serde roundtrip tests for all AST node types
- Test parser error recovery edge cases for malformed patterns
- Validate source span accuracy for destructured bindings
- Add display formatting tests for complex nested patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
